editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p:
Letter from Patrick Carey forwarding a copy of a resolution which was adopted by the Killarney Poor Law Board of Guardians. The resolution offers the family of Mrs William Mangan the board's deepest sympathy.
Patrick Carey (1853-1934) was the Union Clerk for the Killarney Poor Law Board of Guardians. Poor law unions and their workhouses were established by the Poor Law (Ireland) Act, 1838, as a response to widespread poverty, and were each governed by a Board of Guardians. This letter comes from the Killarney Poor Law Board of Guardians Minute Book.

msIdentifier.collection: Killarney Poor Law Board of Guardians BG104/B/4

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
30th Novr.1915 Dear Sir, I am directed by the Board of Guardians of
above Union to forward you the following copy of
Resolution which hasbbeen adopted by them; and
with which I desire to be associated, Yours faithfully, Clerk of Union.
— — — — — — — —
(COPY RESOLUTION)
Proposed by Mr H. Spring, Seconded by Mr T. O'Leary,and unanimously
RESOLVED: That we tender to the family of Mrs
William Mangan,Coolroe,our deep sympathy. That a copy of this Resolution be sent to Mr
William Mangan and to Mr Patrick Kelliher, Aubwee,
Castlemaine.
